creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
I used to dread chemo days. And when I started losing weight, I could barely look at the mirror. 🙈

With God’s grace, I’ve come a long way. 🙏🏻

Treatment week is now a good excuse to dress up because that’s the only time I can go out of the house. 😅

I’m currently obsessed with dress and cardigan combo! It’s just too perfect for Dubai’s mild winter weather. 🎀 Drop a comment if you want outfit links. 

#LifeLately #Healing #ladyandhersweetescapes #DubaiBlogger #dubai #uae #UAEblogger

transcription.text: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, God!
